frozen.BAX_DECISION_RULE: A brain win counts only on a scale where CTM_REF also converged and failed. GROWN requires a permissive non-prior brain to win, random-label ablation to fail, knob-off/matched baseline to fail, and arity-mismatch transfer to avoid collapse. Prior arms that win but track the prior knob are ARCHITECTURE_PRIOR_SUFFICES.
